name: Like Heart
description: Heart icon scales up then bounces on activation.

name: Toggle Switch Pop
description: Toggle with a satisfying spring animation when switched.

name: Checkbox Pop
description: Checkbox springs into view with a jelly bounce on check.

name: Bell Shake
description: Bell rings with jitter animation on hover or trigger.

name: Progress Fill
description: Horizontal bar fills gradually on activation.

name: Ripple Button
description: Material-style ripple effect emanates from click point.

name: Tooltip Pop
description: Tooltip springs in with scale animation on hover.

name: Tab Indicator Slide
description: Active tab indicator smoothly slides between tabs.

name: Count Up
description: Numeric counter animates up to target value on mount.

name: Copy Confirmation
description: Button text changes to 'Copied!' with check, then reverts.

name: Star Rating
description: Hoverable star rating — stars fill with golden color on hover.

name: Drag Handle
description: Cursor shows grab state, item pops on drag start.

name: Badge Pulse
description: Notification badge pulses with a ring — draws attention.

name: Error Shake
description: Input field shakes horizontally on validation error.

name: Floating Action
description: FAB button expands to reveal action labels on hover.
